title: ORIENTOOLS Leaf Blower and Vacuum-3000w Garden Corded Leaves Collector Cleaner 10m Cable Outdoor Leaf Sucker Vacuum with 45L Collection Bag Electric Small Lightweight Air Blower Patios Gutter Driveway
features: POWERFUL 3-IN-1 LEAF BLOWER & VACUUM : Powered by a robust 3000W motor, this electric 3-in-1 garden tool is your all-in-one cleanup solution. Effortlessly switch between a high-speed leaf blower, a powerful leaf collector, and an efficient mulcher with a simple lever to keep your property immaculate.

ADJUSTABLE 6-SPEED CONTROL & EFFICIENT MULCHING : Master any cleanup with the 6-speed controller. Select high power for tough, matted leaves & twigs, or a lower speed for loose grass clippings and sweeping. The powerful impeller mulches at a high 10:1 ratio, efficiently turning 10 bags of yard waste into just one.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN FOR COMFORT & EASE : Say goodbye to back strain. Our comfort-focused design features smooth-gliding wheels to carry the load, a handle that adjusts to your height, and a padded shoulder strap to distribute weight evenly. This lightweight leaf collector lets you work longer with far less effort.

LARGE CAPACITY & EXTENDED REACH : Clean larger areas with fewer stops. This corded leaf blower features a high-capacity 45L collection bag and a long 10m power cable for maximum mobility. Cover your entire garden or driveway without needing to constantly empty the bag or find an extension cord.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS : The ultimate 3000w garden equipment for total yard maintenance. This corded electric leaf blower and leaf sucker vacuum combo is perfect for clearing patios, lawns, driveways, walkways, and gutters, making it an essential outdoor cleaner.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page How do I maintain peak suction performance? A full collection bag is the most common reason for reduced airflow. Simply unzip the bag, empty all collected leaves and debris, and then zip it securely closed. What is the secondary check for optimal airflow? For best performance, also ensure the air outlet (where the bag connects) is clear. Remove the bag, clean out any visible damp leaves or debris, and securely re-attach the bag. What are the steps for a successful power-on? Before starting, always ensure the power plug is firmly and completely seated in the outlet, and also verify that your power supply (the socket or main switch) is turned on and active.
